title: Bahadurgarh FINAL Election Result 2024: Rajesh Joon of IND Wins by...
text:
Bahadurgarh FINAL Election Result 2024: Rajesh Joon of IND Wins by...
Detailed election result of Bahadurgarh constituency in the 2024 Haryana Assembly election. Rajesh Joon is the new Bahadurgarh MLA.
Rajesh Joon (IND) is the winner and elected as the MLA in the 2024 Bahadurgarh Assembly election defeating Dinesh Kaushik (BJP) by a margin of 41,999 votes (26.4%) according to the data published by the Election Commission of India on October 8, 2024 for the 2024 Haryana Assembly election.
Bahadurgarh detailed election result 2024
- 1. Rajesh Joon (Independent), 73191 votes (46%)
- 2. Dinesh Kaushik (Bharatiya Janata Party), 31192 votes (19.61%)
- 3. Rajinder Singh Joon (Indian National Congress), 28955 votes (18.2%)
- 4. Sheela Nafe Singh Rathee (Indian National Lok Dal), 17511 votes (11.01%)
- 5. Ramesh Dalal (Independent), 4745 votes (2.98%)
- 6. Kuldeep Singh Chhikara (Aam Aadmi Party), 966 votes (0.61%)
- 7. NOTA (None of the Above), 564 votes (0.35%)
- 8. Rajesh Kumar S/o Chattar Singh (Independent), 512 votes (0.32%)
- 9. Rajesh Kumar S/o Ramdiya (Independent), 487 votes (0.31%)
- 10. Rohit Kumar (Independent), 294 votes (0.18%)
- 11. Mahender (Independent), 255 votes (0.16%)
- 12. Sunita (Independent), 187 votes (0.12%)
- 13. Parveen Kumar (Independent), 94 votes (0.06%)
- 14. Arun Goyal (Independent), 81 votes (0.05%)
- 15. Chesta (Independent), 66 votes (0.04%)
Past election results in Bahadurgarh
In the 2019 Haryana Assembly elections, Rajinder Singh Joon of INC won in this seat defeating Naresh Kaushik of BJP by a margin of 15,491 which was 11.31% of the total votes cast for the seat. INC had a vote share of 40.77% in 2019 in this seat.
In the 2014 Haryana Assembly elections, Naresh Kaushik of BJP won in this seat defeating Rajinder Singh Joon of INC by a margin of 4,882 which was 3.69% of the total votes cast for the seat. BJP had a vote share of 28.96% in 2014 in this seat.
In the 2009 Haryana Assembly elections, Rajinder Singh Joon of INC won in this seat defeating Nafe Singh Rathi of INLD by a margin of 19,352 which was 21.68% of the total votes cast for the seat. INC had a vote share of 43.28% in 2009 in this seat.
Bahadurgarh Assembly seat – Lok Sabha results
Bahadurgarh Assembly constituency is part of 7. Rohtak (General) Lok Sabha constituency. In the 2024 Lok Sabha elections, INC was the leading party in this assembly segment. The Rohtak Lok Sabha seat was won by Deepender Singh Hooda of INC defeating Dr. Arvind Kumar Sharma of BJP.
In the 2019 Lok Saba polls, BJP led in this assembly segment. The Rohtak Lok Sabha seat was won by Arvind Kumar Sharma of BJP beating Deepender Singh Hooda of INC.
In 2014, INC was ahead in this particular assembly segment and the Rohtak Lok Sabha constituency was won by Deepender Singh Hooda of INC defeating Om Parkash Dhankar of BJP.
In the 2009 Parliamentary elections, INC was the leading party in the Bahadurgarh assembly segment while the Rohtak Lok Sabha constituency was won by Deepender Singh of INC defeating Nafe Singh Rathee of INLD.
Voter turnout in Bahadurgarh
According to data released by the Election Commission of India, in the 2024 Haryana Assembly elections, the voter turnout in Bahadurgarh constituency was 64.47%. In 2019, this seat registered a turnout of 63.10%, while it was 71.11% in 2014 and 66.51% in 2009. The estimated turnout in 2024 was -1.37% compared to the 2019 turnout.
List of contesting candidates and candidate profiles
14 candidates were in the fray for the Bahadurgarh Assembly seat in the 2024 Haryana Assembly election.
Brief profiles of candidates contesting from Bahadurgarh in the 2024 elections sourced from the affidavits submitted by the candidates with the Election Commission of India and as analysed by the Association of Democratic Reforms (ADR):
- Arun Goyal, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 40 years; Profession: Business; Education: 10th Pass; Total assets: Rs 1.2 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Chesta, Independent (IND); Gender: Female; Age: 26 years; Profession: Social Activist & Housewife; Education: Graduate Professional; Total assets: Rs 40.9 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Dinesh Kaushik, Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP); Gender: Male; Age: 54 years; Profession: Property Dealing & Developers & Social Activist; Education: 10th Pass; Total assets: Rs 11.2 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Kuldeep Singh Chhikara, Aam Aadmi Party (AAP); Gender: Male; Age: 66 years; Profession: Self Employed; Education: 10th Pass; Total assets: Rs 2.2 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Mahender, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 46 years; Profession: Farmer; Education: 10th Pass; Total assets: Rs 2 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Parveen Kumar, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 40 years; Profession: Business; Education: Post Graduate; Total assets: Rs 12.3 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Rajesh Joon, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 57 years; Profession: Business; Education: Graduate; Total assets: Rs 61 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 1.
- Rajesh Kumar S/O Chattar Singh, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 53 years; Profession: Agriculturist; Education: 10th Pass; Total assets: Rs 68.2 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Rajesh Kumar S/O Ramdiya, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 47 years; Profession: Farmer; Education: 8th Pass; Total assets: Rs 9.8 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Rajinder Singh Joon, Indian National Congress (INC); Gender: Male; Age: 68 years; Profession: Business; Education: Graduate; Total assets: Rs 52.6 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Ramesh Dalal, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 63 years; Profession: Advocate; Education: Post Graduate; Total assets: Rs 107.1 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Rohit Kumar, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 34 years; Profession: Shopkeeper; Education: 10th Pass; Total assets: Rs 8.1 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Sheela Nafe Singh Rathee, Indian National Lok Dal (INLD); Gender: Female; Age: 57 years; Profession: Agriculturist; Education: Literate; Total assets: Rs 21 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 1.
- Sunita, Independent (IND); Gender: Female; Age: 51 years; Profession: House Wife; Education: 8th Pass; Total assets: Rs 61 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
